meta.name: Stopper® II
meta.description: Enlarged Dome Cover for Stopper Stations and Analogues
meta.heroTitle: Enlarged Dome Cover for Stopper Station Push Buttons and Analogues
meta.heroDescription:
Stopper II is a series of enlarged dome-shaped protective covers designed for Stopper Station universal push buttons and compatible analogues. The clear polycarbonate dome with a spring-loaded lid mechanism provides reliable physical protection against accidental or unauthorised activation while maintaining immediate access to the button in an emergency. The range includes models for indoor and outdoor installation with an IP54 protection rating.

The configuration includes options with a built-in sounder for local audible alarm upon lid opening — powered by a 9V PP3 battery or external 12–24VDC. Six colour insert options are available, along with standard Fire Alarm and Emergency Exit labels, as well as custom text. Mounting options include flush and surface mount, with a back box option for flush installation.
